$comment: ACCESSIBILITY EXCEPTION — theme=ocean, mode=dark. Emitted under [data-theme='ocean'][data-mode='dark']. The brand blue (#0a5c74) reads at only 2.27:1 as TEXT on the dark surface (#211b12), below WCAG AA 4.5:1. This lifts brand-as-text (text.accent + ghost hover) to blue.400 (#57c2dd → 8.26:1). The primary BUTTON is not overridden — white on the deep-blue fill is 7.51:1, already passing, so the fill stays #0a5c74.
